basics.name: Mahesh Bhosale
basics.position: Computer Science PhD Candidate, University at Buffalo
basics.summary: PhD candidate at the University at Buffalo advised by Dr. David Doermann. Research interests: image/video synthesis via diffusion models, and VQA and fairness issues of Multi-Modal Large Language Models (MLLMs).

work.name: Institute of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, University at Buffalo
work.summary: Research topics: multi-modal generative AI. Advised by Dr. David Doermann (A2IL Lab).

work.name: Veritas Technologies LLC
work.summary: Advised by Anindya Banerjee. Developed a novel scheduling algorithm on top of LSTM-based storage and compute resource prediction (IDLEBOT), reducing execution time of resource-intensive tasks by 56%. Benchmarked deep-learning-based sequence modeling solutions and built a ransomware-detection tool modeling the file change log in the Veritas Filesystem (VxFS). Bestowed Certificate of Merit, Veritas Illuminate 2020; led the effort to start an ML-for-Systems group in the org.

work.name: Veritas Technologies LLC
work.summary: Reduced execution time of variants of the 'ls' command by 20% using a directory inode read-ahead algorithm.

education.institution: University at Buffalo, The State University of New York
University at Buffalo, The State University of New York
Walchand College of Engineering, Shivaji University

projects.name: Id-Diff
projects.summary: Exploring relationships between the intrinsic dimension of data and the generative performance of latent diffusion models. In collaboration with Carez AI and the University of Montreal.

projects.name: AI Agents for Pathology
projects.summary: Exploring agentic AI for computational pathology that predicts patient survival while remaining clinically interpretable. In collaboration with NYU Langone Health.

projects.name: Few-Step Distillation of Flow Models
projects.summary: Tackling the instability of GAN training when distilling flow-based generative models into few-step samplers. In collaboration with Meta.

projects.name: Multi-Video Understanding
projects.summary: Improving the efficiency and grounding of article generation from multiple videos given a query. In collaboration with Johns Hopkins University.

awards.title: Research Mentorship Program Scholar
awards.summary: Accepted to a three-month program that matches students with Google mentors and peers to support their pursuit of computer science research pathways.

awards.title: Certificate of Merit - Veritas Illuminate
awards.summary: Presented a paper titled 'IDLEBOT - Predictive execution of resource-intensive tasks' at Veritas's annual technical conference.

awards.title: Silver Medal, World Code Sprint
awards.summary: Awarded a silver medal in the World Code Sprint competitive programming contest.

awards.title: Honorable Mention, ACM-ICPC Amritapuri Regional
awards.awarder: Association for Computing Machinery and Baylor University
awards.summary: Represented Walchand College of Engineering for the first time at the International Collegiate Programming Contest regionals at Amrita University, Coimbatore.

awards.title: Runner Up, Best Project Competition
awards.awarder: Department of Information Technology, WCE, Sangli
awards.summary: Ranked 2nd best project in the department for computing top-10 Twitter hashtags with real-time processing and sentiment analysis using Apache Spark, Beautiful Soup, and the Twitter4j API, visualized with D3.js.

awards.title: Runner Up, MindSpark Coding Competition
awards.summary: An algorithmic coding competition with over 500 students in teams of two from colleges across India, spanning MCQ, short-coding, and long-coding rounds.

awards.title: DST Inspire Science Camp (Top 1%)
awards.awarder: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Pune
awards.summary: Selected (top 1%) for a week-long science camp hosted by the Department of Science and Technology, Government of India, and IIIT Pune.
